title: GCD of Two Numbers
description:
Find the Greatest Common Divisor (GCD) of two numbers.

Implement an efficient solution using the Euclidean algorithm.

startCode.initialCode:

import sys
def main():
    input_data = sys.stdin.read().split()
    if not input_data: return
    a = int(input_data[0])
    b = int(input_data[1])
    print(gcd(a, b))
if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()

referenceSolution.completeCode:
# --- USER SOLUTION START ---
def gcd(a, b):
    while b: a, b = b, a % b
    return a
# --- USER SOLUTION END ---

import sys
def main():
    input_data = sys.stdin.read().split()
    if not input_data: return
    a = int(input_data[0])
    b = int(input_data[1])
    print(gcd(a, b))
if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
